steps.t: The dwarf-bard's sheet music has been spread throughout the Orc-camps in Fehem-dûm and Hadâd-dûm. With the failure of his plan, Hamall wishes to raise…
Hamall is at Jazârgund, west of Fehem-dûm and Hadâd-dûm. Hamall's spirits will be greatly raised by the ancient dwarf-songs you recovered.
